'''holahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickeliferous|nickeliferous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickeliferous|nickeliferous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:holahithi|holahithi]] || [[word:holahiji|holahiji]] || [[word:holahishi|holahishi]] || [[word:holahiki|holahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:holahuthuthu|holahuthuthu]] || [[word:holahujuju|holahujuju]] || [[word:holahushushu|holahushushu]] || [[word:holahukuku|holahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:holahuthu|holahuthu]] || [[word:holahuju|holahuju]] || [[word:holahushu|holahushu]] || [[word:holahuku|holahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:holahufthuf|holahufthuf]] || [[word:holahufjuf|holahufjuf]] || [[word:holahufshuf|holahufshuf]] || [[word:holahufkuf|holahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:holahethe|holahethe]] || [[word:holaheje|holaheje]] || [[word:holaheshe|holaheshe]] || [[word:holaheke|holaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:holahothotho|holahothotho]] || [[word:holahojojo|holahojojo]] || [[word:holahoshosho|holahoshosho]] || [[word:holahokoko|holahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:holahotho|holahotho]] || [[word:holahojo|holahojo]] || [[word:holahosho|holahosho]] || [[word:holahoko|holahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:holahofthof|holahofthof]] || [[word:holahofjof|holahofjof]] || [[word:holahofshof|holahofshof]] || [[word:holahofkof|holahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:holahÃŸfthÃŸf|holahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfjÃŸf|holahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfshÃŸf|holahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfkÃŸf|holahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:holahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|holahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|holahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|holahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|holahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:holahÃŸfthÃŸf|holahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfjÃŸf|holahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfshÃŸf|holahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfkÃŸf|holahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:holahÃŸfthÃŸf|holahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfjÃŸf|holahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfshÃŸf|holahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holahÃŸfkÃŸf|holahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:holahÃḊthÃḊ|holahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:holahÃḊjÃḊ|holahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:holahÃḊshÃḊ|holahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:holahÃḊkÃḊ|holahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:holahathatha|holahathatha]] || [[word:holahajaja|holahajaja]] || [[word:holahashasha|holahashasha]] || [[word:holahakaka|holahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:holahatha|holahatha]] || [[word:holahaja|holahaja]] || [[word:holahasha|holahasha]] || [[word:holahaka|holahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:holahafthaf|holahafthaf]] || [[word:holahafjaf|holahafjaf]] || [[word:holahafshaf|holahafshaf]] || [[word:holahafkaf|holahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:holahasha|holahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:holahshÃḋsha|holahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holahrosha|holahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holahmusha|holahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:holahyasha|holahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholahnkshÃḋsha|goholahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholahnkrosha|goholahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholahnkmusha|goholahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholahnkyasha|goholahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:holalahasha|holalahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holalahshÃḋsha|holalahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holalahrosha|holalahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holalahmusha|holalahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holalahyasha|holalahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholalahnkshÃḋsha|goholalahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholalahnkrosha|goholalahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholalahnkmusha|goholalahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholalahnkyasha|goholalahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:helÃḊhasha|helÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:helÃḊhshÃḋsha|helÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:helÃḊhrosha|helÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:helÃḊhmusha|helÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:helÃḊhyasha|helÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohelÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gohelÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohelÃḊhnkrosha|gohelÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohelÃḊhnkmusha|gohelÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohelÃḊhnkyasha|gohelÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:holfahasha|holfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holfahshÃḋsha|holfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holfahrosha|holfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holfahmusha|holfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holfahyasha|holfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholfahnkshÃḋsha|goholfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholfahnkrosha|goholfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholfahnkmusha|goholfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholfahnkyasha|goholfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
